case_title: BARSHAK JACKIE VS JAMES O'HANLON BROS /O'HANLON MOTORCYCLE REPAIR

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $400.00 FILED BY BARSHAK JACKIE AS TO DEFENDANT JAMES O'HANLON BROS /O'HANLON MOTORCYCLE REPAIR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-19-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JAMES O'HANLON BROS /O'HANLON MOTORCYCLE REPAIR
DECLARATION BY THE WITNESS, DWIGHT LYTLE, FILED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BARSHAK JACKIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JAMES O'HANLON BROS /O'HANLON MOTORCYCLE REPAIR STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DECLARATION BY THE WITNESS, JOE LAMB, FILED.
